description: Style Notebasics adds a sense of sophistication and style to your outfit with this belt. With a rustic and contemporary look, tune up your style quotient with this belt - wear with denim shorts, jeans, or even light coloured formal pants.Product DetailsDark brown coloured belt with minute detailed designing, metal buckle with five buckle holes and a belt loopMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
